title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council MDRRMC) 22- 03, Dated June 8, 2022 Entitled ?resolution Realigning Certain Portions of the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction Management Fund Current Appropriations for Cy 2022 Amounting to One Million Three Hundred Eighty Thousand Pesos (P 1,380,000.00) for Various Purposes and Approving the Same.?
